objective: Absorb remaining open community PRs onto dev via PABCD with Sol subagents, push dev (pre-approved), and stabilize dev CI: (1) fix Cross-platform CI windows-latest failure (tests/ci-workflows.test.ts:190) and verify green run; (2) reconcile PR #149 docs with landed 9a6e20e6, absorb additive parts or close as superseded; (3) absorb PR #148 Combos GUI workspace adapted to our landed combo runtime, Wibias authorship preserved, then close; (4) PR #144 request-changes comment only, leave open; (5) evaluate our draft PR #138 for obsolescence. Per-cycle gates: tsc, focused+broad tests, GUI gates for GUI work, fresh gh CI evidence after each push.
